entries.title: Built-ins
entries.summary: Tea exposes a small set of global `@` intrinsics for output, script control, introspection, and math.

functions.name: print
functions.summary: Write the string representation of a value to stdout.

functions.name: println
functions.summary: Write the string representation of a value to stdout with a newline.

functions.name: append
functions.summary: Append a value to a mutable list in place.

functions.name: to_string
functions.summary: Convert any value to its string representation.

functions.name: type_of
functions.summary: Return the runtime type name of a value as a string.

functions.name: panic
functions.summary: Terminate the program immediately with an error message.

functions.name: exit
functions.summary: Exit the program with the specified exit code.

functions.name: args
functions.summary: Return command-line arguments as a list of strings.

functions.name: read_line
functions.summary: Read a single line from stdin (without trailing newline).

functions.name: read_all
functions.summary: Read all content from stdin as a string.

functions.name: eprint
functions.summary: Print a value to stderr without a trailing newline.

functions.name: eprintln
functions.summary: Print a value to stderr with a trailing newline.

functions.name: is_tty
functions.summary: Return true if stdin is connected to an interactive terminal.

functions.name: len
functions.summary: Return the number of elements in a String, List, or Dict.

functions.name: floor
functions.summary: Round a float down to the nearest integer.

functions.name: ceil
functions.summary: Round a float up to the nearest integer.

functions.name: round
functions.summary: Round a float to the nearest integer.

functions.name: abs
functions.summary: Return the absolute value of a float.

functions.name: sqrt
functions.summary: Return the square root of a float.

functions.name: max
functions.summary: Return the maximum of two floats.

functions.name: min
functions.summary: Return the minimum of two floats.

functions.name: all
functions.summary: Return all command-line arguments as a list of strings.

functions.name: program
functions.summary: Return the program name (argv[0] with path stripped).

functions.name: parse
functions.summary: Parse command-line arguments using a declarative command spec.

functions.name: parse_with
functions.signature_display: pub def parse_with[T](spec: T, argv: List[String]) -> CliParseResult
functions.summary: Parse an explicit argv list using a declarative command spec.

functions.name: has
functions.summary: Check if a flag is present in the arguments.

functions.name: get
functions.summary: Get the value of an option argument.

functions.name: positional
functions.summary: Return positional arguments (arguments that are not flags or option values).

entries.title: std.assert
entries.summary: Assertion helpers for tests and runtime checks.

functions.name: ok
functions.summary: Asserts that a value is truthy.

functions.name: eq
functions.summary: Asserts that two values are equal.

functions.name: ne
functions.summary: Asserts that two values are not equal.

functions.name: snapshot
functions.summary: Asserts that a value matches a saved snapshot.

entries.title: std.env
entries.summary: Environment variable access and working directory management.

functions.name: get
functions.summary: Get the value of an environment variable.

functions.name: get_or
functions.signature_display: pub def get_or(name: String, fallback: String) -> String
functions.summary: Get the value of an environment variable, or a fallback when it is unset.

functions.name: has
functions.summary: Return true when an environment variable is set.

functions.name: require
functions.summary: Get an environment variable or fail when it is unset.

functions.name: set
functions.signature_display: pub def set(name: String, value: String) -> Void
functions.summary: Set an environment variable.

functions.name: unset
functions.summary: Unset an environment variable.

functions.name: vars
functions.summary: Get all environment variables as a dictionary.

functions.name: cwd
functions.summary: Get the current working directory.

functions.name: set_cwd
functions.summary: Change the current working directory.

functions.name: temp_dir
functions.summary: Return the platform temporary directory.

functions.name: home_dir
functions.summary: Return the user home directory when available.

functions.name: config_dir
functions.summary: Return the user configuration directory when available.

entries.title: std.fs
entries.summary: Filesystem operations for reading, writing, and managing files and directories.

functions.name: read_file
functions.summary: Read a text file.

functions.name: write_file
functions.signature_display: pub def write_file(file_path: String, content: String) -> Void
functions.summary: Write text to a file.

functions.name: create_dir
functions.summary: Create a directory.

functions.name: ensure_dir
functions.summary: Create a directory and any missing parent directories.

functions.name: mkdir_p
functions.summary: Alias for ensure_dir().

functions.name: remove
functions.summary: Remove a file or directory.

functions.name: exists
functions.summary: Return true when a path exists.

functions.name: read_dir
functions.summary: List all entries in a directory.

functions.name: walk
functions.summary: Recursively walk a directory and return full entry paths.

functions.name: glob
functions.summary: Return filesystem entries that match a glob pattern.

functions.name: copy
functions.signature_display: pub def copy(source_path: String, target_path: String) -> Void
functions.summary: Copy a file to a new location.

functions.name: rename
functions.signature_display: pub def rename(source_path: String, target_path: String) -> Void
functions.summary: Rename or move a file or directory.

functions.name: metadata
functions.summary: Get metadata information for a file or directory.

functions.name: stat
functions.summary: Alias for metadata().

functions.name: read_lines
functions.summary: Read a text file and split it into lines.

functions.name: write_lines
functions.signature_display: pub def write_lines(file_path: String, lines: List[String]) -> Void
functions.summary: Write a list of lines to a file, joining them with "\n".

functions.name: append_file
functions.signature_display: pub def append_file(file_path: String, content: String) -> Void
functions.summary: Append text to a file, creating it when it does not exist.

functions.name: encode
functions.summary: Encode any Tea value to a JSON string.

functions.name: decode
functions.summary: Decode a JSON string to a Tea value.

functions.name: read_file
functions.summary: Read a JSON file and decode it.

functions.name: write_file
functions.signature_display: pub def write_file[T](file_path: String, value: T) -> Void
functions.summary: Encode a value as JSON and write it to a file.

entries.title: std.path
entries.summary: Path manipulation utilities for working with file paths.

functions.name: join
functions.summary: Join path components into a single path.

functions.name: split
functions.summary: Split a path into its components.

functions.name: dirname
functions.summary: Get the directory part of a path.

functions.name: basename
functions.summary: Get the filename part of a path.

functions.name: extension
functions.summary: Get the extension of a path.

functions.name: normalize
functions.summary: Normalize a path by resolving redundant separators and dot segments.

functions.name: absolute
functions.summary: Resolve a path to an absolute path using the current working directory.

functions.name: absolute_from
functions.signature_display: pub def absolute_from(file_path: String, base_path: String) -> String
functions.summary: Resolve a path to an absolute path using an explicit base directory.

functions.name: relative
functions.signature_display: pub def relative(target_path: String, base_path: String) -> String
functions.summary: Compute the relative path from a base location to a target.

functions.name: is_absolute
functions.summary: Return true when a path is absolute.

functions.name: separator
functions.summary: Return the platform-specific path separator.

functions.name: parent
functions.summary: Alias for dirname().

functions.name: stem
functions.summary: Return the file name without its final extension.

entries.title: std.process
entries.summary: Process execution for running subprocesses and capturing their output.

functions.name: run
functions.signature_display: pub def run(command: String, args: List[String]) -> ProcessResult
functions.summary: Run a command synchronously and wait for it to complete.

functions.name: run_with_options
functions.signature_display: pub def run_with_options(command: String, args: List[String], env: Dict[String, String], cwd: String, stdin: String) -> ProcessResult
functions.summary: Run a command with full options (env, cwd, stdin).

functions.name: spawn
functions.signature_display: pub def spawn(command: String, args: List[String]) -> Int
functions.summary: Start a command without waiting for it to complete.

functions.name: spawn_with_options
functions.signature_display: pub def spawn_with_options(command: String, args: List[String], env: Dict[String, String], cwd: String) -> Int
functions.summary: Spawn a command with full options (env, cwd).

functions.name: wait
functions.summary: Wait for a spawned process to complete and return its result.

functions.name: kill
functions.summary: Terminate a spawned process.

functions.name: read_stdout
functions.summary: Read data from a spawned process's stdout.

functions.name: read_stdout_bytes
functions.signature_display: pub def read_stdout_bytes(handle: Int, bytes: Int) -> String
functions.summary: Read up to the specified number of bytes from a spawned process's stdout.

functions.name: read_stderr
functions.summary: Read data from a spawned process's stderr.

functions.name: read_stderr_bytes
functions.signature_display: pub def read_stderr_bytes(handle: Int, bytes: Int) -> String
functions.summary: Read up to the specified number of bytes from a spawned process's stderr.

functions.name: write_stdin
functions.signature_display: pub def write_stdin(handle: Int, data: String) -> Void
functions.summary: Write data to a spawned process's stdin.

functions.name: close_stdin
functions.summary: Close a spawned process's stdin pipe.

functions.name: close
functions.summary: Close a spawned process handle without waiting for it.

functions.name: check
functions.summary: Require a process result to have exited successfully.

functions.name: run_checked
functions.signature_display: pub def run_checked(command: String, args: List[String]) -> ProcessResult
functions.summary: Run a command and fail when it exits with a non-zero status.

functions.name: run_checked_with_options
functions.signature_display: pub def run_checked_with_options(command: String, args: List[String], env: Dict[String, String], cwd: String, stdin: String) -> ProcessResult
functions.summary: Run a command with full options and fail when it exits with a non-zero status.

functions.name: stdout_lines
functions.summary: Split captured stdout into lines.

functions.name: stderr_lines
functions.summary: Split captured stderr into lines.

entries.title: std.regex
entries.summary: Regular expression pattern matching and text manipulation.

functions.name: compile
functions.summary: Compile a regex pattern and return a handle.

functions.name: is_match
functions.signature_display: pub def is_match(handle: Int, text: String) -> Bool
functions.summary: Test if the pattern matches anywhere in the text.

functions.name: find_all
functions.signature_display: pub def find_all(handle: Int, text: String) -> List[String]
functions.summary: Find all non-overlapping matches as a list of strings.

functions.name: captures
functions.signature_display: pub def captures(handle: Int, text: String) -> List[String]
functions.summary: Get capture groups from the first match.

functions.name: replace
functions.signature_display: pub def replace(handle: Int, text: String, replacement: String) -> String
functions.summary: Replace the first match with a replacement string.

functions.name: replace_all
functions.signature_display: pub def replace_all(handle: Int, text: String, replacement: String) -> String
functions.summary: Replace all matches with a replacement string.

functions.name: split
functions.signature_display: pub def split(handle: Int, text: String) -> List[String]
functions.summary: Split the text by the pattern into a list of strings.

entries.title: std.string
entries.summary: String manipulation utilities for common text operations.

functions.name: index_of
functions.signature_display: pub def index_of(text: String, pattern: String) -> Int
functions.summary: Find the first occurrence of a substring.

functions.name: contains
functions.signature_display: pub def contains(text: String, pattern: String) -> Bool
functions.summary: Return true when the string contains a substring.

functions.name: split
functions.signature_display: pub def split(text: String, delimiter: String) -> List[String]
functions.summary: Split a string by a delimiter.

functions.name: starts_with
functions.signature_display: pub def starts_with(text: String, prefix: String) -> Bool
functions.summary: Check if a string starts with a given prefix.

functions.name: ends_with
functions.signature_display: pub def ends_with(text: String, suffix: String) -> Bool
functions.summary: Check if a string ends with a given suffix.

functions.name: trim_start
functions.summary: Trim whitespace from the start of a string.

functions.name: trim_end
functions.summary: Trim whitespace from the end of a string.

functions.name: trim
functions.summary: Trim whitespace from both ends of a string.

functions.name: reverse
functions.summary: Reverse a string.

functions.name: replace
functions.signature_display: pub def replace(text: String, pattern: String, replacement: String) -> String
functions.summary: Replace all occurrences of a substring with another string.

functions.name: to_lower
functions.summary: Convert a string to lowercase.

functions.name: to_upper
functions.summary: Convert a string to uppercase.

functions.name: join
functions.signature_display: pub def join(parts: List[String], separator: String) -> String
functions.summary: Join a list of strings with a separator.

functions.name: lines
functions.summary: Split text into lines, trimming a trailing "\r" from each line and dropping the final empty line produced by a trailing newline.

functions.name: repeat
functions.signature_display: pub def repeat(text: String, count: Int) -> String
functions.summary: Repeat a string count times.
